case_title: NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COLLECTION SERVICE, INC. VS. BAPC INC, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COLLECTION SERVICE, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAPC INC, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $10,501.54 PRINCIPAL, $792.12 INTEREST, $425.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,718.66, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100146382)
